title: Build a career in nephrology care.
lead: We hire for empathy first — the medicine we can teach.
no_open_roles: No openings right now. Send your CV and we'll keep it on file.
how_to_apply_body: Email your CV to {email} with the role in the subject line. We respond to every application within a week.
what_we_look_for: Curiosity about evidence — we read journals together.
Comfort working in a team that crosses departments.
